settings.description: Tune display, season, and launch behavior.
settings.reduceMotionDescription: Minimize transitions and animated effects across the app.
settings.showSplashDescription: Play the intro animation the next time the app opens.
settings.themeDescription: Switch between light and dark pit-wall views.
settings.title: Settings

footer.dataDescription: Transparent data attribution and open-source access for curious fans and contributors.
footer.tagline: Track the season with quick access to standings, schedules, and race-weekend results from one polished pit wall.

nav.mobileHint: Tap a destination to keep your season selection and continue.

calendar.heading: Race Events Calendar · {{season}}
calendar.description: Plan the season at a glance with every Grand Prix, round number, circuit location, session date, and race status in chronological order.

empty.title: No race events scheduled
empty.message: There are no race events available for {{season}}. Try another season or check back when the calendar is updated.

empty.title: No race results available
empty.message: There are no completed races to show for {{season}} yet. Results will appear here once a Grand Prix has finished.

driverStandings.heading: Driver Standings · {{season}}
driverStandings.exportAriaLabel: Download driver standings table data for {{season}}

empty.title: No driver standings available
empty.message: We could not find driver standings for the {{season}} season yet. Try another season or check back after the next race weekend.

progression.heading: Ranking progression
progression.description: Follow every classified driver as their championship ranking changes after each race. Hover or focus a marker for round details.
progression.unavailable: Round-by-round ranking data is unavailable for this season right now.
progression.chartAriaLabel: Driver championship ranking progression by round

hero.heading: Compare drivers side by side
hero.description: Pick any two drivers from the standings to compare ranking, points, wins, team details, nationality, and profile links in one race-control view.

share.title: {{leftName}} vs {{rightName}}
share.text: Compare {{leftName}} and {{rightName}} in the {{season}} F1 standings.

status.idle: Share this exact driver matchup with the current season and selections.
status.shared: Share sheet opened for this comparison.
status.error: Unable to share right now. Please copy the URL from your browser.

radar.heading: Driver strengths
radar.description: Scores compare rank, points, wins, recent form, and consistency on a 0–100 scale for the {{season}} matchup.
radar.noBiggestEdge: No single biggest edge: both drivers are level across the radar scores.
radar.timelineLoading: Recent form and consistency will refresh when round-by-round standings finish loading.

championshipRank.label: Championship rank
championshipRank.description: Current standings position, where lower rank is stronger.

pointsHaul.label: Points haul
pointsHaul.description: Total season points normalized between the selected pair.

winConversion.label: Win conversion
winConversion.description: Grand prix wins converted into a comparative strength score.

recentForm.label: Recent form
recentForm.description: Points gained across the most recent five rounds available.
recentForm.loadingDescription: Season points used until round-by-round standings are loaded.

consistency.label: Consistency
consistency.description: Average championship position across the available season timeline.
consistency.loadingDescription: Current rank used until round-by-round standings are loaded.

pointsEvolution.heading: Points evolution
pointsEvolution.unavailable: Round-by-round points data is unavailable for this season right now.
pointsEvolution.description: Hover or focus any round marker to compare cumulative points after each Grand Prix.

performance.description: Bars normalize the selected pair only, making close gaps easy to spot.

empty.title: Not enough drivers to compare
empty.message: We need at least two classified drivers in the {{season}} standings before a side-by-side comparison can be built.

hero.heading: Compare constructors side by side
hero.description: Pick any two teams from the standings to compare ranking, points, wins, classified drivers, lead-driver pace, and profile links in a clean head-to-head view.

summary.driversUnavailable: Driver classification is still loading or unavailable for this constructor.

share.title: {{leftName}} vs {{rightName}}
share.text: Compare {{leftName}} and {{rightName}} in the {{season}} F1 constructor standings.

status.idle: Share this exact constructor matchup with the current season and selections.
status.shared: Share sheet opened for this comparison.
status.error: Unable to share right now. Please copy the URL from your browser.

radar.heading: Team strengths
radar.description: Scores compare rank, points, wins, average output, recent form, and consistency on a 0–100 scale for the {{season}} matchup.
radar.noBiggestEdge: No single biggest edge: both teams are level across the radar scores.
radar.timelineLoading: Recent form and consistency will refresh when round-by-round standings finish loading.

championshipRank.label: Championship rank
championshipRank.description: Current standings position, where a lower rank is stronger.

pointsHaul.label: Points haul
pointsHaul.description: Total constructor points normalized between the selected pair.

winConversion.label: Win conversion
winConversion.description: Grand prix wins turned into a comparative strength score.

averageOutput.label: Average output
averageOutput.description: Average points per classified driver, showing how efficiently each lineup converts entries into points.

recentForm.label: Recent form
recentForm.description: Points gained across the most recent five rounds available.
recentForm.loadingDescription: Season points used until round-by-round constructor standings are loaded.

consistency.label: Consistency
consistency.description: Average championship position across the available season timeline.
consistency.loadingDescription: Current rank used until round-by-round constructor standings are loaded.

pointsProgression.heading: Points progression
pointsProgression.unavailable: Round-by-round constructor points are unavailable for this season right now.
pointsProgression.description: Track cumulative constructor points after each race to see where the selected teams gained or lost momentum.
pointsProgression.chartAriaLabel: Constructor championship points progression by round

performance.description: Bars normalize the selected pair only, making close constructor gaps easy to spot.

empty.title: Not enough constructors to compare
empty.message: We need at least two classified constructors in the {{season}} standings before a side-by-side comparison can be built.

constructorStandings.heading: Constructor Standings
constructorStandings.exportAriaLabel: Download constructor standings table data for {{season}}

empty.title: No constructor standings available
empty.message: We could not find constructor standings for the {{season}} season yet. Try another season or check back after the next race weekend.

spotlight.heading: Constructor standouts
spotlight.description: A quick look at the leading teams across {{season}}.
spotlight.podiumsDescription: {{team}} reaches the top three most often in {{season}}.
spotlight.penaltiesDescription: {{team}} took the most grid penalties in {{season}}.

driverRaceDetails.error: Error: Driver race details are unavailable
driverRaceDetails.compoundsFitted: Compounds fitted at recorded pit stops

empty.title: Driver result not found
empty.message: No race result was found for this driver in {{season}} round {{round}}.

strategy.heading: Tire strategy
strategy.description: Stint order and estimated lap counts based on recorded pit stops.
strategy.unavailable: Tire strategy data is unavailable for this driver.

pitStops.heading: Pit stops
pitStops.empty: No pit stop data is available for this driver.

hero.heading: Qualifying · {{season}}
hero.description: Browse completed qualifying sessions, compare race weekends, and jump into full session results with a cleaner, race-card layout.

performance.heading: Qualifying performance
performance.description: Compare average starting position for the top {{count}} drivers across completed {{season}} qualifying sessions. Lower positions are better.
performance.chartAriaLabel: {{season}} driver qualifying average position comparison chart

list.heading: Completed sessions
list.latestFirstDescription: Newest qualifying sessions are shown first.
list.chronologicalDescription: Sessions are shown in calendar order.

empty.title: No qualifying sessions available
empty.message: There are no completed qualifying sessions to show for {{season}} yet. Session results will appear here after qualifying is complete.

qualifyingResults.heading: Round {{round}} Qualifying Results
qualifyingResults.description: Session-by-session lap times with driver, constructor, and same-round tire strategy context.
qualifyingResults.exportAriaLabel: Download qualifying results table data for {{season}} round {{round}}

empty.title: No qualifying results available
empty.message: Qualifying results for {{season}} round {{round}} are not available yet. Check back after the session classification is published.

classification.heading: Full qualifying classification
classification.description: Missing times are shown as {{notAvailable}} when a driver did not progress. Tire strategy is based on recorded race pit stops when available.

timeline.heading: How qualifying unfolded
timeline.description: Key knockout moments derived from the published classification, ordered from Q1 to the pole shootout.

cutoff.headline: {{driver}} reached {{nextSession}} on the bubble
cutoff.summaryWithGap: {{driver}} advanced to {{nextSession}} with a {{time}}, edging out {{eliminatedDriver}} by {{gap}}s.
cutoff.summary: {{driver}} took the final place in {{nextSession}} with a {{time}}.
cutoff.context_one: P{{position}} was the final transfer spot; {{count}} driver was eliminated.
cutoff.context_other: P{{position}} was the final transfer spot; {{count}} drivers were eliminated.

pole.headline: {{driver}} secured pole position
pole.summary: {{driver}} put {{constructor}} on pole with a {{time}} in Q3.

raceResults.error: Error: This Grand Prix has not taken place

investigations.error: Steward investigations could not be loaded.

timePenalties.error: Time penalty adjustments could not be loaded.

chart.error: Lap-by-lap position data could not be loaded.

empty.title: No sprint results available
empty.message: Sprint results for {{season}} round {{round}} are not available yet. This round may not include a sprint session.

quickActions.heading: Compare the grid in one click

lastRaceResults.heading: Last Race Results · {{season}}
lastRaceResults.empty: No results found for the last race.

newsFeed.heading: Formula 1 headlines
newsFeed.error: Unable to load the latest F1 news right now.
newsFeed.emptyMessage: Fresh Formula 1 headlines will appear here as soon as they are available.

seasonLeaders.heading: Season Leaders · {{season}}
seasonLeaders.description: Unofficial season snapshots across race, sprint, and qualifying, including fastest laps.

empty.title: No season leaders available

sections.driversDescription: The standout drivers across wins, podiums, poles, fastest laps, sprints, and reliability.
sections.constructorsDescription: The teams leading the unofficial season categories in race pace, qualifying, and reliability.
